# Dark/Modern Style — tao-slide

## Color Scheme

| Role | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Background | `0F172A` | Slide background (dark slate) |
| Primary | `6366F1` | Headings, accent bars |
| Accent | `22D3EE` | Highlights, key metrics, links |
| Text Light | `F1F5F9` | Body text on dark bg |
| Text Muted | `94A3B8` | Secondary text, captions |
| Surface | `1E293B` | Cards, code blocks, containers |
| Border | `334155` | Subtle borders on shapes |

## Font Pairing

- **Heading**: Inter (Bold/SemiBold)
- **Body**: Inter (Regular/Light)
- **Code/Data**: JetBrains Mono or SF Mono

## Layout Rules

- Dark background throughout — no white slides
- Gradient accent bars: `6366F1` → `22D3EE` (indigo to cyan)
- Glow effects on key numbers: subtle drop shadow `6366F1` at 30% opacity
- Rounded corners on all shapes (`borderRadius`)
- Thin neon divider lines (1px `22D3EE`)
- Title slides: large gradient text, centered
- Content slides: left-aligned text, right visual area

## When to Use

- Tech presentations, startup pitches
- Developer talks, engineering updates
- Product demos, SaaS presentations
- Any context where "modern" or "dark mode" is mentioned
